During the year, month or day presided over by Mercury
fortune will smile on those who are proficient in the art of jugglery,
hypnotism and magic, mines, townsmen, musicians, painters,
accountants (or mathematicians) and fighters. Kings will be eager
to exchange wonderful gifts creating joy among themselves with
